---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement for OpenClaw Guided Install
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: bobrapp
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem you're trying to solve. Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Scope

Which area of the project does this affect?

- [ ] Web UI (React frontend)
- [ ] Backend API (Express server)
- [ ] Installation scripts (shell)
- [ ] CI/CD workflows
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Supply-chain / SBOM
- [ ] Governance / compliance

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or references to help explain your request.
